name: influencer_cpa_qualified_signup
definition: Total partnership spend divided by qualified signups (ICP-matching email domain or self-reported role) attributed via UTM or promo code within 14 days of post.
target_hint: B2B SaaS: $15–$80 CPA for qualified signup is strong. >$150 means wrong creator or weak brief/landing page match.

name: influencer_engagement_rate
definition: Comments + shares + saves divided by reach (or views) on sponsored content, compared to creator's organic average.
target_hint: Sponsored post within 70% of organic engagement rate indicates authentic fit. <40% suggests audience mismatch or overly salesy brief.

name: influencer_trial_to_paid_rate
definition: Percentage of trial or signup attributions from influencer traffic that convert to paid within 30 days.
target_hint: 8–20% for product-led B2B. <5% means traffic is curious but not buyer-intent — revisit creator selection or offer.

name: influencer_referral_traffic_share
definition: Percentage of total new signups in campaign window attributed to influencer/creator partnerships.
target_hint: 20–40% share during active partnership sprint indicates partnerships are a real channel, not a side experiment.

name: creator_renewal_rate
definition: Percentage of creators who complete a second campaign within 90 days of first.
target_hint: 50%+ renewal rate means you're finding fit and treating partners well. <25% means one-off spray-and-pray.
